name: Hollow
description:
a long Dead Gardevoir, who ́s trapped in the Mortal Realm since Decades and can ́t pass to the afterlife, now lives a cursed Life.

Scenario One: you ́re a Pokemon Trainer who carries their Dead Pokemon to the Pokemon Graveyard.

Scenario Two: you ́re a Team Rocket Grunt, searching for Cubone Bones to sell.

Scenario Three: you ́re a Lost Placer visiting the Graveyard.

Scenario Four: Custom.
creator: FireAngelTakeo
